EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IRasterInfo2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster info object.

[Guid("28E745A8-0617-4EB0-B8BD-272A945ED117")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterInfo2 : IRasterInfo

The raster attribute table.

ITable AttributeTable { get; set; }
